---
title: "About"
subtitle: "Assistant Professor | Department of Mathematics | National Institute of Technology Warangal"
description-meta: "Biography, research interests, education, appointments, awards and professional activities of Sivalingam S M."
title-block-banner: True
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
---

# Biography

I am an **Assistant Professor** in the **Department of Mathematics** at the **National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal), India**.

My research lies at the intersection of **Scientific Machine Learning**, **Applied Mathematics**, and **Control Theory**, where I develop mathematically rigorous learning algorithms for scientific and engineering applications.

My research combines mathematical analysis, numerical methods, optimization, and machine learning to solve challenging problems arising in differential equations, dynamical systems, scientific computing, and control engineering. A central theme of my work is integrating modern artificial intelligence with classical mathematical theory to develop reliable, interpretable, and theoretically guaranteed computational methods.

Prior to joining NIT Warangal, I worked as a **Postdoctoral Fellow** at the **Laboratoire de Mécanique Paris-Saclay**, **École Normale Supérieure Paris-Saclay**, **Université Paris-Saclay, France**, under the supervision of **Prof. Ludovic Chamoin**, where my research focused on **Learning-Based Model Predictive Control**, **Neural Networks**, and **Scientific Machine Learning**.

---

# Research Interests

My current research interests include

- Scientific Machine Learning
- Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs)
- Neural Differential Equations
- Fractional Calculus
- Fractional Differential Equations
- Model Predictive Control
- Dynamical Systems
- Stochastic Differential Equations
- Numerical Analysis
- Scientific Computing
- Mathematical Optimization
- Operator Learning

---

# Academic Appointments

| Period | Position |
|:-------|:---------|
| 2026–Present | **Assistant Professor**, Department of Mathematics, National Institute of Technology Warangal, India |
| 2025–2026 | **Postdoctoral Fellow**, Laboratoire de Mécanique Paris-Saclay, École Normale Supérieure Paris-Saclay, Université Paris-Saclay, France|

---

# Education

## Ph.D. in Mathematics

**National Institute of Technology Puducherry**

2022–2025

**Advisor:** Dr. V. Govindaraj

**Dissertation:** *A Bidirectional Study of Scientific Machine Learning and Dynamical Systems under Uncertainty.*

---

## M.Sc. Statistics and Applied Mathematics

**Central University of Tamil Nadu**

2020–2022

CGPA: **9.50**

**Advisor:** Dr. Narasimhulu Dunna

**Dissertation:** *Study of Decay Parameter of Blast Waves of Nuclear Explosion using Lie Group Similarity Transformation and Machine Learning Techniques*

---

## B.Sc. Mathematics

**Sadakathullah Appa College**

2017–2020

CGPA: **9.60**

**Advisor:** Prof. Rasitha Begum

**Dissertation:** *Application of Mathematics in Rocket and Space Technology*

---

# Research Overview

My research aims to build mathematical foundations for modern machine learning algorithms used in scientific computing.

Current topics include

- Mathematical theory of neural differential equations
- Neural operators for differential equations
- Physics-informed learning
- Scientific machine learning
- Fractional-order dynamical systems
- Learning-based control
- Robust Model Predictive Control
- Scientific computing under uncertainty
- Numerical methods for ordinary and partial differential equations

---

# Selected Achievements

- TWAS Research and Training Fellowship (2025)
- UGC-NFOBC Senior Research Fellowship (2024)
- UGC-NFOBC Junior Research Fellowship (2021)
- CSIR-NET Qualified
- IIT-JAM Qualified

---

# Editorial and Professional Activities

- Guest Editor, *Fractals* (Special Issue on Fractional-Order Dynamical Systems)
- Scientific Committee Member, Annual International Congress on Computer Science
- Reviewer for leading international journals in

  - Nonlinear Dynamics
  - Physica Scripta
  - New Journal of Physics
  - Soft Computing
  - Mathematics
  - European Physical Journal Plus
  - International Journal of Dynamics and Control
  - Contemporary Mathematics
  - Journal of Mathematics and Computer Science

---

<!-- # Student Supervision

I actively supervise undergraduate and postgraduate students in

- Scientific Machine Learning
- Control Theory
- Numerical Methods
- Differential Equations
- Mathematical Modelling

I welcome motivated students interested in pursuing research in these areas.

---   -->
